articles.title: Royal Navy helicopter crash worrying, PM says
articles.description: The Ministry of Defence says an investigation into the incident is underway.

articles.title: US and Iran launch new strikes, as Kuwait says airport hit by Iranian drones
articles.description: Kuwait says one person is dead after drones hit civilian buildings including its international airport.

articles.title: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum opens
articles.description: Several long-range drones struck oil storage facilities near in the city, days before Vladimir Putin is due to address the event.

articles.title: How a content creator tried to use a YouTube alibi to get away with murder
articles.description: Stephen McCullagh, 36, of Woodland Gardens in Lisburn, will serve at least 31 years in prison for the murder of his pregnant partner Natalie McNally.
